name: Fujian Qingshan Paper Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Fujian Qingshan Paper Industry Co., Ltd. produces and sells paper products in China. Its products include paper bags, kraft paper, kraft cardboards, corrugated paper, color pulp boards, viscose fiber wood pulp, and others. The company offers its products under the Qingshan brand. Fujian Qingshan Paper Industry Co., Ltd. exports its products to Southeast Asia, the Middle East, and other countries and regions. The company was formerly known as Qingzhou Paper Mill. Fujian Qingshan Paper Industry Co., Ltd. was founded in 1958 and is based in Fuzhou, China.
